meta.description: Complete ready-to-use strategy playbook. Each strategy defines market conditions, entry rules, exits, risk, and best symbols.

strategies.name: Multi-Timeframe Trend Continuation
strategies.condition: H4 and H1 aligned in one direction, ADX(M15) > 25
entry: M15 pullback into fib 0.5-0.618 of the last impulse + EMA50 or order block.
M5 prints engulfing/pin in trend direction.

strategies.name: Liquidity Sweep Reversal (APA)
strategies.condition: Price sweeps equal highs/lows or a major swing point at an HTF POI (OB/FVG) in premium/discount.
entry: Sweep wick beyond the level, close back inside.
Enter at the M1 order block created by the CHoCH.

strategies.name: Boom Spike Hunter
strategies.condition: Boom index, spike probability >= 65 (spike-detection.json), price at M15 demand zone.
entry: BUY at the demand zone during down-drift with M1 slowing momentum.
takeProfit: Exit immediately after spike prints, or trail 2xATR after spike

strategies.name: Crash Spike Hunter
strategies.condition: Crash index, spike probability >= 65, price at M15 supply zone.
entry: SELL at the supply zone during up-drift with M1 slowing momentum.
takeProfit: Exit after spike prints or trail

strategies.name: Boom/Crash Drift Rider
strategies.condition: Fresh spike just printed (cycle reset). Ride the drift.
entry: Sell Boom / buy Crash on first M1 pullback rejection after the spike.
EMA9 below EMA21 (Boom) or above (Crash) on M1.
takeProfit: Fixed small target 1:1.5; hard exit before 50% of average cycle elapses
strategies.warning: NEVER hold into an overdue spike window.

strategies.name: Bollinger Squeeze Breakout
strategies.condition: BB width at 20-period low on M15 (volatility contraction).
entry: Wait for a full-bodied candle CLOSE outside the squeeze range with rising tick volume.
Enter on the retest of the range edge.
takeProfit: Measured move: squeeze height projected from breakout point

strategies.name: Range Fader
strategies.condition: ADX(M15) < 20, clear horizontal range with 2+ touches each side.
entry: At range extreme: rejection candle + RSI beyond 70/30 + stochastic cross.

strategies.name: Divergence Reversal
strategies.condition: Clear RSI/MACD divergence at an HTF level after an extended move.
entry: Divergence visible on M15 or higher.
Wait for CHoCH on M5 to confirm.
Enter on the retest of the broken structure.
takeProfit: TP1: EMA50, TP2: 0.5 of the prior leg
strategies.warning: Counter-trend rules apply: 5+ confluences, half size.

strategies.name: VWAP Trend Scalp
strategies.condition: Intraday trend with price consistently on one side of VWAP.
entry: Pullback to VWAP + rejection candle in trend direction on M1.

rules: Boom/Crash symbol -> spike strategies + drift_rider ONLY.
Multiple strategies valid -> pick the one whose confluences overlap most with current findings; signal engine fuses them.
